title: Pee Safe × Smriti Mandhana — #BeInYourComfortZone
description: Donayan Sahdev was Director / Associate Producer on Pee Safe's #BeInYourComfortZone with Smriti Mandanna (2026). The film reframes period care as confident and comfortable — cancelling the struggle, one cycle at a time, with bright, female-first storytelling built for social sharing.

title: Aarohi Loans for Women
description: For Godrej Capital's Aarohi Loans for Women (2026), Donayan Sahdev served as Director / Associate Producer on a film reframing borrowing as empowerment. Intimate, real-world vignettes position Aarohi as a trusted partner in financial independence for women entrepreneurs.

title: Centrum × Kajal Aggarwal — Chief Claims Advocate
description: Donayan Sahdev was Director / Associate Producer on two Centrum 'Chief Claims' films with Kajal Agarwal (2025). Credibility-led direction and a composed on-screen presence balance star appeal with product clarity to earn the confidence of health-conscious households.

title: Armani Exchange × Kartik Aaryan — Lifestyle Reel
description: A fashion and lifestyle branded reel featuring Kartik Aaryan for Armani Exchange — premium cinematography and social-first storytelling with luxe visual aesthetics, built for Instagram engagement.

title: Armani Exchange × Kartik Aaryan — Fall 2024 Watch Collection
description: Donayan Sahdev was Director / Associate Producer on Armani Exchange's Fall 2024 watch collection with Kartik Aaryan — a rhythm-driven fashion film where editorial precision meets a metropolitan mood, framing the watches as everyday luxury.

title: Pantaloons Winter Campaign
description: A lifestyle fashion campaign for Pantaloons' winter collection, shot with vibrant photography and youthful styling to carry the brand's seasonal story across social.

title: Pocket FM × Urfi Javed
description: A viral social media campaign for Pocket FM featuring Urfi Javed, designed to maximize engagement with entertaining, high-impact promotional storytelling.

title: Ted To Toe Campaign
description: A fashion campaign for Ted To Toe celebrating individuality and confidence through premium commercial photography and digital content production.

title: Dove — Beauty Test Stops With Me
description: A social awareness campaign for Dove challenging beauty stereotypes, built on authentic storytelling and purpose-driven branded content.

title: Armani Exchange Social Campaign
description: A sponsored social campaign featuring Kartik Aaryan for Armani Exchange watches, pairing luxury fashion visuals with premium digital storytelling.

title: Commercial Color Grading Showcase
description: A commercial color grading showcase demonstrating advanced post-production workflows and cinematic finishing across premium advertising visuals.

title: Tanishq Rivaah Campaign
description: A premium bridal jewellery campaign for Tanishq Rivaah, shot with elegant photography and luxury styling for high-end commercial production.

title: Madhaniya Music Video
description: A cinematic music video built on emotional storytelling and rich visuals, finished with premium post-production for digital music audiences.

title: Fossil Campaign
description: A lifestyle commercial for Fossil highlighting modern living and premium craftsmanship through aspirational, cinematic brand filmmaking.

title: Instagram Brand Reel
description: Short-form branded content for digital platforms — engaging storytelling and premium editing tuned for high-performing social media.

title: Lakmé Campaign
description: A beauty campaign for Lakmé showcasing professional makeup techniques with vibrant visuals and polished commercial content for social engagement.

title: Vicks Roll On + Inhaler Ad — ft. Guneet Sandhu
description: At The Glitch, Donayan Sahdev was Director / Associate Producer on Vicks Bumper Ads (2022) — fast, relief-led storytelling built for mobile-first recall. (Portfolio clip shown is the Vicks Roll On + Inhaler cut.)

title: Simple Skincare Campaign
description: A skincare awareness campaign with clean product visuals and educational storytelling through premium commercial photography.

title: Disney+ Hotstar — The Night Manager Pranks (Aditya Roy Kapur)
description: At The Glitch, Donayan Sahdev was 3rd AD on Disney+ Hotstar's The Night Manager promo — a mischievous guerrilla campaign starring Aditya Roy Kapur that turned a hotel takeover into a playful, shareable series tease.

title: Taaza Khabar Promotion
description: A digital promo for Disney+ Hotstar's Taaza Khabar, combining cinematic storytelling, influencer marketing and entertainment branding.

title: Freddy Promotion
description: A promotional campaign for Hotstar's Freddy starring Kartik Aaryan, built for social engagement with cinematic visuals and entertainment marketing.

title: Skinn Noura — A Gift From You, To You
description: Skinn's Noura fragrance is celebrated as a gift from you, to you in this sensorial brand film. Soft, feminine cinematography and a delicate rhythm frame Noura as an act of self-love rather than occasion-wear luxury. The film leans into intimacy and ritual, positioning the scent as a daily, personal indulgence.

title: Dell Futurist — Make Music With Lost Stories On Alienware
description: Dell's Futurist initiative teams Alienware with electronic duo Lost Stories to turn cutting-edge tech into music. This brand film follows the artists composing on high-performance machines, merging product capability with creative ambition. Energetic, tech-glossy visuals position Alienware as the instrument for makers pushing what's possible next.

title: World Is Yours To Take — Sustainability Streetwear India
description: 'World Is Yours To Take' is a brand film championing sustainability in Indian streetwear. Following young creators reimagining fashion through conscious choices, it pairs documentary warmth with bold, street-styled visuals. The film frames responsible design as cultural ownership, encouraging a generation to wear its values and claim the future on its own terms.
